children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct a study on the effects on the limitation on producers to move quota to a farm other than the farm to which the quota was initially assigned under part I of subtitle B of title III of the Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938 ( et seq.).7 U.S.C. 1311

children.heading: Report
children.label: 2 Report
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate a report on the results of the study.May 13, 2002
